Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings; **First Appearance Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Oct-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Christopher LeClerc, Esq. 415-445-0900 for Plaintiff LeClerc & LeClerc
John Ricca, Esq. 415-986-5900 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP for Defendant.(In-person)
Court reporter: Justus Balentine, CSR #13859, 714-471-2597, justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com, Reported.

Argued. Mr. LeClerc argues/contests the Court's tentative ruling. Mr. Ricca responds. authorit (as fully reported in the court reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FIBROGEN, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings.

Taken Under Submission. Parties to submit a 3-page brief on the issue of leave to amend and papaer copies for the Court no later than close of business on Tuesday, 10/3/23. The Court will delay ruling till then.

Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Justus Balentine, CSR #13859, 714-471-2597, justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com, Reported. (302/CK)
